'''wawadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iyomante|iyomante]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-w-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iyomante|iyomante]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| wawadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæwædhæth|wæwædhæth]] || [[word:wæwædhæj|wæwædhæj]] || [[word:wæwædhæsh|wæwædhæsh]] || [[word:wæwædhæ|wæwædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wawawadhath|wawawadhath]] || [[word:wawawadhaj|wawawadhaj]] || [[word:wawawadhash|wawawadhash]] || [[word:wawawadha|wawawadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wawadhath|wawadhath]] || [[word:wawadhaj|wawadhaj]] || [[word:wawadhash|wawadhash]] || [[word:wawadha|wawadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wawafdhath|wawafdhath]] || [[word:wawafdhaj|wawafdhaj]] || [[word:wawafdhash|wawafdhash]] || [[word:wawafdhaf|wawafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wawadhatha|wawadhatha]] || [[word:wawadhaja|wawadhaja]] || [[word:wawadhasha|wawadhasha]] || [[word:wawadhaka|wawadhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wawadhath|wawadhath]] || [[word:wawadhaj|wawadhaj]] || [[word:wawadhash|wawadhash]] || [[word:wawadha|wawadha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wawadhathal|wawadhathal]] || [[word:wawadhajal|wawadhajal]] || [[word:wawadhashal|wawadhashal]] || [[word:wawadhakal|wawadhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wawadhathatha|wawadhathatha]] || [[word:wawadhajaja|wawadhajaja]] || [[word:wawadhashasha|wawadhashasha]] || [[word:wawadhaka|wawadhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wawadhathan|wawadhathan]] || [[word:wawadhajan|wawadhajan]] || [[word:wawadhashan|wawadhashan]] || [[word:wawadhakan|wawadhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wawadhathaoro|wawadhathaoro]] || [[word:wawadhajaoro|wawadhajaoro]] || [[word:wawadhashaoro|wawadhashaoro]] || [[word:wawadhakaoro|wawadhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
